title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: This episode of the Mixture of Experts podcast, hosted from IBM's New York office during Tech Week, discusses the changing role of software engineers in the era of AI, the phenomenon of "tokenmaxxing" where companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip for running large models on personal PCs, and challenges facing universities as students graduate into AI-transformed workplaces with calls for mandatory AI literacy courses.
